name: parobek
description: Parobek marketplace — a local-LLM helper for Claude Code that offloads assistive tasks to a local model (LM Studio or any OpenAI-compatible server) to reduce Anthropic token usage.

plugins.name: parobek
plugins.description: Your local farmhand for Claude Code: a local LLM does the grunt work behind /local-* commands (e.g. /local-compact, token-free context compaction) so you spend fewer Anthropic tokens.
